indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of seats are designed for sitting and watching, not lying down and sleeping.

indicators.name: hard wood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not comfortable for lying down and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and ventilation, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no personal storage
indicators.rationale: No personal storage or furniture to create a private sleeping area.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for primary sleep. The seating arrangement, hard flooring, lack of windows, and absence of personal storage make it unsuitable for sleeping. It scores a 2 because it is clearly designed for an entirely different purpose.
